message:
feat(fp-io): add write_csv options struct parity (frankenpandas-djye)

Adds CsvWriteOptions (delimiter/na_rep/header) and
write_csv_string_with_options matching the in-memory subset of
pd.DataFrame.to_csv(sep, na_rep, header). na_rep replaces Null
scalars, f64::NAN, and Timedelta::NAT in the output; header=false
omits the leading header row. write_csv_string now delegates to the
options path with defaults so existing callers are unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
